C. Blood Drawing Supplies 

• 
Specimen containers. 

D. Incontinence Supplies 

• Incontinence briefs and Chux Covered in the normal course of a visit. For 
example, if a home health aide in the course of a bathing visit to a patient 
determines the patient requires an incontinence brief change, the incontinence 
brief in this example would be covered as a routine medical supply. 

E. Other 

• 
Thermometers; and 
• 
Tongue
